x$statement_analysis.name: x$statement_analysis
x$statement_analysis.caption: Statement Analysis
x$statement_analysis.description: Aggregated statistics of normalized statements. Shows query frequency, total latency, and execution metrics.

x$statements_with_runtimes_in_95th_perce.name: x$statements_with_runtimes_in_95th_percentile
x$statements_with_runtimes_in_95th_perce.caption: Statements in Highest 5% by Runtime
x$statements_with_runtimes_in_95th_perce.description: Statements whose average runtime is in the top 5 percentile. High-impact queries requiring attention.

statements_with_temp_tables.name: statements_with_temp_tables
statements_with_temp_tables.caption: Using Temp Tables
statements_with_temp_tables.description: Statements that created internal temporary tables. Disk tables impact performance significantly.

statements_with_sorting.name: statements_with_sorting
statements_with_sorting.caption: With Sorting
statements_with_sorting.description: Statements that required sort operations. May indicate need for indexes or query optimization.

statements_with_full_table_scans.name: statements_with_full_table_scans
statements_with_full_table_scans.caption: Full Table Scans
statements_with_full_table_scans.description: Statements performing full table scans. Indicates missing indexes or suboptimal queries.

statements_with_errors_or_warnings.name: statements_with_errors_or_warnings
statements_with_errors_or_warnings.caption: Errors or Warnings
statements_with_errors_or_warnings.description: Statements that produced errors or warnings. Important for debugging application issues.

schema_object_overview.name: schema_object_overview
schema_object_overview.caption: Schema Object Overview (High Overhead)
schema_object_overview.description: Counts of schema objects by type. Warning: This view can be slow on databases with many objects.

x$schema_index_statistics.name: x$schema_index_statistics
x$schema_index_statistics.caption: Schema Index Statistics
x$schema_index_statistics.description: Statistics on index usage. Helps identify unused or rarely used indexes.

x$schema_table_statistics.name: x$schema_table_statistics
x$schema_table_statistics.caption: Schema Table Statistics
x$schema_table_statistics.description: Table-level statistics including row operations and latency.

x$schema_table_statistics_with_buffer.name: x$schema_table_statistics_with_buffer
x$schema_table_statistics_with_buffer.caption: Schema Table Statistics (with InnoDB buffer)
x$schema_table_statistics_with_buffer.description: Table statistics including InnoDB buffer pool impact. High overhead on large buffers.

schema_tables_with_full_table_scans.name: schema_tables_with_full_table_scans
schema_tables_with_full_table_scans.caption: Tables with Full Table Scans
schema_tables_with_full_table_scans.description: Tables accessed with full table scans. May indicate missing indexes.

schema_unused_indexes.name: schema_unused_indexes
schema_unused_indexes.caption: Unused Indexes
schema_unused_indexes.description: Indexes that have not been used. Candidates for removal to reduce storage and maintenance overhead.

x$io_global_by_file_by_bytes.name: x$io_global_by_file_by_bytes
x$io_global_by_file_by_bytes.caption: Top File I/O Activity
x$io_global_by_file_by_bytes.description: File I/O statistics ordered by bytes read/written. Identifies most heavily used files.

x$io_global_by_file_by_latency.name: x$io_global_by_file_by_latency
x$io_global_by_file_by_latency.caption: Top I/O by File by Time
x$io_global_by_file_by_latency.description: File I/O statistics ordered by latency. Identifies slowest files.

x$io_global_by_wait_by_bytes.name: x$io_global_by_wait_by_bytes
x$io_global_by_wait_by_bytes.caption: Top I/O by Event Category
x$io_global_by_wait_by_bytes.description: I/O wait events grouped by type, ordered by bytes transferred.

x$io_global_by_wait_by_latency.name: x$io_global_by_wait_by_latency
x$io_global_by_wait_by_latency.caption: Top I/O in Time by Event Categories
x$io_global_by_wait_by_latency.description: I/O wait events ordered by total latency. Identifies slowest I/O operations.

x$io_by_thread_by_latency.name: x$io_by_thread_by_latency
x$io_by_thread_by_latency.caption: Top I/O Time by User/Thread
x$io_by_thread_by_latency.description: I/O statistics grouped by thread. Shows which threads cause most I/O latency.

x$waits_global_by_latency.name: x$waits_global_by_latency
x$waits_global_by_latency.caption: Global Waits by Time
x$waits_global_by_latency.description: Global wait events ordered by total latency. Shows where the database waits most.

x$waits_by_user_by_latency.name: x$waits_by_user_by_latency
x$waits_by_user_by_latency.caption: Waits by User by Time
x$waits_by_user_by_latency.description: Wait events grouped by user. Shows which users experience the most wait time.

x$wait_classes_global_by_latency.name: x$wait_classes_global_by_latency
x$wait_classes_global_by_latency.caption: Wait Classes by Time
x$wait_classes_global_by_latency.description: Wait events grouped by class (io, lock, sync, etc). High-level view of wait bottlenecks.

x$wait_classes_global_by_avg_latency.name: x$wait_classes_global_by_avg_latency
x$wait_classes_global_by_avg_latency.caption: Waits Classes by Average Time
x$wait_classes_global_by_avg_latency.description: Wait classes ordered by average latency. Identifies inherently slow wait types.

x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_schema.name: x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_schema
x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_schema.caption: InnoDB Buffer Stats by Schema
x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_schema.description: InnoDB buffer pool usage by database schema. Shows how much each schema uses the buffer.

x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_table.name: x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_table
x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_table.caption: InnoDB Buffer Stats by Table
x$innodb_buffer_stats_by_table.description: InnoDB buffer pool usage by table. Shows which tables consume the most buffer space.

x$user_summary.name: x$user_summary
x$user_summary.caption: Overview
x$user_summary.description: Summary of user resource consumption. Shows connections, statements, and I/O per user.

x$user_summary_by_file_io_type.name: x$user_summary_by_file_io_type
x$user_summary_by_file_io_type.caption: I/O Statistics
x$user_summary_by_file_io_type.description: File I/O statistics grouped by user and operation type.

x$user_summary_by_statement_type.name: x$user_summary_by_statement_type
x$user_summary_by_statement_type.caption: Statement Statistics
x$user_summary_by_statement_type.description: Statement statistics grouped by user and SQL command type.

x$memory_global_total.name: x$memory_global_total
x$memory_global_total.caption: Total Memory
x$memory_global_total.description: Total memory usage across the MySQL server. Shows current and high-water mark.

x$memory_global_by_current_bytes.name: x$memory_global_by_current_bytes
x$memory_global_by_current_bytes.caption: Top Memory by Event
x$memory_global_by_current_bytes.description: Memory allocations ordered by current bytes used. Identifies largest memory consumers.

x$memory_by_user_by_current_bytes.name: x$memory_by_user_by_current_bytes
x$memory_by_user_by_current_bytes.caption: Top Memory by User
x$memory_by_user_by_current_bytes.description: Memory usage grouped by user. Shows which users consume the most memory.

x$memory_by_host_by_current_bytes.name: x$memory_by_host_by_current_bytes
x$memory_by_host_by_current_bytes.caption: Top Memory by Host
x$memory_by_host_by_current_bytes.description: Memory usage grouped by host. Shows which hosts consume the most memory.

x$memory_by_thread_by_current_bytes.name: x$memory_by_thread_by_current_bytes
x$memory_by_thread_by_current_bytes.caption: Top Memory by Thread
x$memory_by_thread_by_current_bytes.description: Memory usage grouped by thread. Shows which threads consume the most memory.
